extModManifestBean.name: @name@
extModManifestBean.shortDesc: Scelight module for Zerg larva analysis, phase metrics, timelines, and benchmark rankings.
extModManifestBean.description:
Larva Seconds Lost analyzes Zerg replays inside Scelight and highlights when hatcheries floated larva, how much inject uptime was maintained, and where missed inject windows likely occurred.

The replay page now includes a larva timeline preview, per-phase metrics for Early, Mid, Late, and End game, and benchmark-based larva generation and larva missed rankings.
